title: Earthy GUI
description: Toned down, earthy-sepia look for (modded) Minecraft.
body:
# Earthen GUI
**Toned down, easy on the eyes, ready for dirty hands!**

---

This UI overhaul turns the old Minecraft gray into a mild sepia with tunes down colors. It supports various mods.

See screenshots for an impression.
[Made for the Fertility modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fertility)
